# core.Forcing { #paleobeasts.core.Forcing }

```python
core.Forcing(data, time=None, params=None, interpolation='cubic')
```

Unified forcing object for callables, time series arrays, and element sequences.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [from_csv](#paleobeasts.core.Forcing.from_csv) | Create a forcing object from packaged datasets or an arbitrary CSV file. |
| [get_forcing](#paleobeasts.core.Forcing.get_forcing) | Get forcing value(s) at time ``t``. |

### from_csv { #paleobeasts.core.Forcing.from_csv }

```python
core.Forcing.from_csv(
    dataset=None,
    file_path=None,
    value_name=None,
    time_name=None,
    params=None,
    interpolation='cubic',
)
```

Create a forcing object from packaged datasets or an arbitrary CSV file.

### get_forcing { #paleobeasts.core.Forcing.get_forcing }

```python
core.Forcing.get_forcing(t)
```

Get forcing value(s) at time ``t``.
